summary: Comprehensive testing of SnapAid emergency app completed. Both backend APIs and frontend UI are functioning excellently with 91.7% backend success rate and near-perfect frontend functionality.

minor_bugs.issue: Create incident returns 200 instead of 201 status code

passed_tests: Citizen dashboard displays SOS button, upload buttons, profile and emergency links
Emergency Numbers page shows all 7 emergency numbers with click-to-call
Language selector switches between English, Tamil, and Hindi successfully
Police dashboard shows incident feed, stats cards, search and filters
Backend API authentication and protected endpoints
Media analysis and incident creation workflows
Real-time data sync between backend and police dashboard
